description: Ground every confidence value in real computation: FactConfidence enum, drop confidence_floor, drop GraphNode/Edge.confidence defaults, schema migration
R0 ContextEngine + cascade orchestrator + eval harness. Defines QueryResult.relevance + Hit.score (algorithmic only).
R2 Tier 3 HybridTier (vector + fulltext + rerank). Needs Neo4j HNSW vector index.
notes: Reranker deferred; sentence-transformers dep not added (see human-backlog).

description: R4 Tier 2 RouterTier (Pioneer.ai GLiNER2). Likely blocked on human fine-tuning.
notes: Stub fallback ships; real GLiNER2 fine-tune is human-only on Pioneer.ai (see human-backlog).

description: R3 Tier 4 AgenticTier (Gemini function-calling). Needs GEMINI_API_KEY.
notes: NoopLLMClient ships as default; real Gemini gated on GEMINI_API_KEY (see human-backlog).
